goal: 给 E:/Work/Cooki/ClaudeCode/knowledge-base 做一个 Web 知识管理系统，仅本地运行，不考虑认证。要求：浏览所有 markdown 文档，支持目录和标签导航，类似维基百科的双向链接跳转，全文搜索，以及简单的文档编辑能力。代码输出到 E:/Work/Cooki/ClaudeCode/knowledge-base/web/ 目录

tree.description: Fix Flask app to serve static/index.html directly instead of the minimal Jinja2 template, ensuring the full UI loads correctly
Fix all broken frontend JS: wikilink click navigation, search result clicks, tag filter with tree rebuild, backlinks rendering, editor toggle/save/cancel, and hamburger menu toggle
Fix CSS issues: tree indentation for nested folders, tag cloud active state, backlinks panel styling, editor container layout, and mobile responsive hamburger overlay

Fix backend API endpoints: ensure /api/search returns correct format with snippets, /api/doc POST saves content and rebuilds index, /api/tags/<name> returns filtered doc list, and wikilink HTML output uses correct CSS class and data attributes for JS click handling
Start the server, manually verify all features work end-to-end: tree navigation, doc loading, wikilinks, search, tags, backlinks, editor save, then commit and push
